## Description
<!-- Describe your changes here -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] UI/Visual changes

## Related Issues
<!-- Link to related issues: Closes #123 -->

## Changes Made
- [ ] Functional code changes
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] Updated documentation

## Visual Changes
- [ ] No UI changes
- [ ] Minor visual tweaks (updated snapshots not required)
- [ ] Significant UI changes (updated snapshots required)

**If visual changes were made:**
- [ ] I have reviewed the visual differences in the test artifacts
- [ ] I have commented `/update-snapshots` to update baseline screenshots (or manually committed updates)
- [ ] Changes have been tested on multiple browsers (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit)

## Testing
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] Visual regression tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add before/after screenshots if there are UI changes -->

---

**Note:** If you made UI changes, make sure visual test snapshots are updated:
1. Wait for GitHub Actions to complete
2. Review the test artifacts
3. Comment `/update-snapshots` if the changes look correct
